title: Jurisdictions (membership reference)
description: EU and UN member-state lists (ISO 3166-1 alpha-2) for resolving restriction framework jurisdiction. File: global/jurisdictions.json (`file_type`: jurisdictions; required object key `jurisdictions`).

unit.description: Human-readable encoding hints for this file and related porto-data fields. Required: country_code (alpha-2 in jurisdictions.eu / jurisdictions.un). Other keys are optional documentation (e.g. region_code, date); values are short standard names.

jurisdictions.description: Per-bloc membership lists: keys `eu` and `un` match symbolic restriction jurisdictions (EU, UN).

eu.description: EU member states (ISO 3166-1 alpha-2); subset of `un`
